query:
INSERT INTO workspace_next_actions (workspace_id, action, completed) VALUES
(1, 'IMMEDIATE — File Motion to Compel on FINRA DR Portal by 07/17/2026. Include all three exhibits and forensic deliverables.', 0),
(1, 'IMMEDIATE — Upload complete evidence bundle to FINRA DR Portal: Exhibit 1 (Discovery Request), Exhibit 2 (Robinhood Objection + Settlement Rejection), Exhibit 3 (Exhibit B pages + Sept 9 zoom).', 0),
(1, 'THIS WEEK — Prepare rebuttal brief for Robinhood strict liability argument. Address: (1) device token ≠ authorization, (2) network anomalies override token consistency, (3) IP 89.116.218.6 never appeared in any prior session.', 0),
(1, 'THIS WEEK — Draft demand for wallet approval records for the USDC destination address used on Sept 9. This is the missing piece that could prove the wallet was never approved by Claimant.', 0),
(1, 'THIS WEEK — Research FINRA arbitration precedents where device token matching was insufficient defense against unauthorized access claims.', 0),
(1, 'LATER — If Motion to Compel is granted, prepare follow-up discovery requests for: MFA/2FA logs for Sept 9, internal fraud flags, device approval creation IP and timestamp.', 0),
(1, 'LATER — Evaluate whether to escalate settlement demand above $5,500 if Motion to Compel reveals additional Robinhood negligence.', 0),
(1, 'WAITING ON — Robinhood response to Motion to Compel filing.', 0),
(1, 'WAITING ON — FINRA arbitrator ruling on discovery dispute.', 0);
command:
